mapper.insert: INSERT INTO multi_agent_registration_audit( session_id, request_id, user_id, work_plan_id, schedule_id, doctor_id, dept_sub_id, date, slot, amount, out_trade_no, status, error_code, error_message, registration_id, trace_json, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES( #{sessionId}, #{requestId}, #{userId}, #{workPlanId}, #{scheduleId}, #{doctorId}, #{deptSubId}, STR_TO_DATE(#{date}, '%Y-%m-%d'), #{slot}, #{amount}, #{outTradeNo}, #{status}, #{errorCode}, #{errorMessage}, #{registrationId}, #{traceJson}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT id, session_id AS sessionId, request_id AS requestId, user_id AS userId, work_plan_id AS workPlanId, schedule_id AS scheduleId, doctor_id AS doctorId, dept_sub_id AS deptSubId, DATE_FORMAT(date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, slot, FORMAT(amount, 2) AS amount, out_trade_no AS outTradeNo, status, error_code AS errorCode, error_message AS errorMessage, registration_id AS registrationId, trace_json AS traceJson, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdAt, DATE_FORMAT(updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS updatedAt FROM multi_agent_registration_audit WHERE request_id = #{requestId} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, session_id AS sessionId, request_id AS requestId, user_id AS userId, work_plan_id AS workPlanId, schedule_id AS scheduleId, out_trade_no AS outTradeNo, status, error_code AS errorCode, error_message AS errorMessage, trace_json AS traceJson FROM multi_agent_registration_audit WHERE status = 'RESERVED' AND updated_at <= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{minutes} MINUTE) ORDER BY id ASC
